inputs.label: Spot Price
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of the underlying asset per unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current market price of the underlying asset per unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dayanak varlığın birim başına güncel piyasa fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Marktpreis des Basiswerts pro Einheit.

inputs.label: Futures Price
inputs.businessContext: Futures contract price for delivery at a future date.

businessContext_i18n.en: Futures contract price for delivery at a future date.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki bir teslimat için vadeli işlem sözleşme fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Terminkontraktpreis für Lieferung zu einem zukünftigen Zeitpunkt.

inputs.label: Spot Volatility (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Annualized standard deviation of spot price returns.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annualized standard deviation of spot price returns.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spot fiyat getirilerinin yıllıklandırılmış standart sapması.

inputs.label: Futures Volatility (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Annualized standard deviation of futures price returns.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annualized standard deviation of futures price returns.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vadeli işlem fiyat getirilerinin yıllıklandırılmış standart sapması.

inputs.label: Correlation
inputs.businessContext: Correlation coefficient between spot and futures returns.

businessContext_i18n.en: Correlation coefficient between spot and futures returns.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spot ve vadeli işlem getirileri arasındaki korelasyon katsayısı.

inputs.label: Exposure (Units)
inputs.businessContext: Total quantity of the asset to hedge (e.g., bushels, barrels).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total quantity of the asset to hedge (e.g., bushels, barrels).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Korunacak varlığın toplam miktarı (ör. kile, varil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmenge des abzusichernden Vermögenswerts (z. B. Scheffel, Barrel).

inputs.label: Contract Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units of the underlying asset per futures contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units of the underlying asset per futures contract.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vadeli işlem sözleşmesi başına dayanak varlığın birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten des Basiswerts pro Terminkontrakt.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
